name: PixelOS
tagline: Clean, minimal release notes for users who just want the essentials fast.
highlights: Shorter notes stay readable without looking empty or unfinished.
Fits stable release communication and smaller incremental drops well.
Device targeting stays clear even on narrower mobile screens.
changelog: Kept the stable PixelOS release concise and easy to scan.
Rolled smaller incremental updates into one cleaner public-facing drop.
Preserved quick readability for both Nothing Phone 2a variants.
